title: Domain pack spec cross-link README NM-5 runtime table
problem: Tickets 123–124 documented NM-5 runtime loading in README and AGENTS.md, but docs/agents/06_DOMAIN_PACK_SPEC.md does not point operators to the committed runtime consumer table.
acceptance_criteria: 06_DOMAIN_PACK_SPEC.md references README NM-5 pack file table and overlap-domain claim rules.
No duplication of full table — short pointer with README link.
Golden tests and full pytest remain green.
non_goals: No README edits beyond optional reciprocal link.
No public site or schema changes.
